node.text: John's game next month is in Seattle, a city he loves for its energy, diversity, food, and fan support.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Seattle for a game") on Observation 5 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: John celebrated with his teammates at a restaurant after winning a tough game.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Seattle for a game") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.77)

node.text: John is part of a basketball team which he feels lucky to be a part of.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Seattle for a game") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.86)

node.text: John had a basketball game where his team was trailing significantly in the 4th quarter, but they dug deep to overturn the deficit and win the game.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Seattle for a game") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.77)

node.text: John mentioned exploring endorsements and used his contacts in the basketball industry and marketing skills to make connections.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Seattle for a game") on Observation 4 (Score: 0.59)

node.text: John talks about winning a b-ball game against another team that was close until the final buzzer.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Seattle for a game") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.64)

node.text: John scored 40 points in a game last week, his highest ever.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Seattle for a game") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.52)

node.text: John has signed a deal with Nike for a basketball shoe and gear, and is in talks with Gatorade for a potential sponsorship.
John finds that struggles in sports, like overcoming deficits, lead to a greater sense of satisfaction when victorious.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Seattle for a game") on Observation 3 (Score: 0.57)

node.text: John values the bond created by being around people who share the same love for basketball.
